title: Quality Scores
description: Produced by closed-loop-quality-scorer (Phase 4 stream 5). Aggregates per-agent quality metrics from framework-memory/telemetry/<YYYY-MM-DD>.jsonl into a single framework-memory/quality-scores.json. The canonical consumer of telemetry records; Phase 5+ agents read this file to learn from prior runs instead of inventing their own storage. Precision is the only metric populated in Phase 4 — recall waits for reviewer-coverage data that lands Phase 6+, so recall fields are present but null.

schema_version.description: Schema version. Bumped when the record shape changes incompatibly so consumers can branch on it.

generated_at.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp of this aggregation run. Stale files are detectable by comparing against the newest telemetry date.

agents.description: Per-agent scores keyed by agent name (the frontmatter `name`, e.g. `py-solid-dry-reviewer`). An agent with no telemetry in the window is simply absent — the map is sparse, not pre-seeded with every registered agent.

Summary.description: Aggregate roll-up across every agent in this run. Sits at the top so a consumer can size the dataset before walking the per-agent map.

total_agents.description: Count of distinct agents with at least one telemetry record in the window. Equals the number of keys in `agents`.

total_runs.description: Sum of `run_count` across every agent — the total telemetry records aggregated this run.

window_start.description: Timestamp of the earliest telemetry record aggregated, or null when no telemetry exists yet (a fresh framework-memory tree).

window_end.description: Timestamp of the latest telemetry record aggregated, or null when no telemetry exists yet.

AgentScore.description: One agent's aggregated metrics. precision = verdicts not overturned by the user / total verdicts; null when the agent emitted no verdict records (e.g. a scanner that produces reports, not verdicts). p95 latency/cost are null when the telemetry carried no duration/cost fields for this agent.

precision.description: Fraction of this agent's verdicts the user did not overturn. null when no verdict records exist for the agent in the window.

recall.description: Always null in Phase 4. Recall requires reviewer-coverage data (ground-truth defects an agent should have caught) that lands Phase 6+ when stack reviewers ship. The field exists now so the schema is stable when that data arrives.

latency_ms_p95.description: 95th-percentile wall-clock duration in milliseconds across this agent's runs. null when telemetry carried no duration field.

cost_usd_p95.description: 95th-percentile token cost in USD across this agent's runs. null when telemetry carried no cost field.

run_count.description: Number of telemetry records aggregated for this agent. At least 1 — an agent absent from telemetry is absent from the map entirely.

last_updated.description: Timestamp of this agent's most recent telemetry record.
